mentions.text:
Cerebras soon to IPO at $35B+ valuation.

This is the holy grail of OpenAi contagion. 

-> $8.1B valuation few months ago
-> Sam Altman hints at $20-30B deal over 3 years.
-> $23B valuation.
-> Now it’s $35B+ to the public.

If OpenAI promises $BIRD $5 trillion in orders, does it suddenly make it a $6 company?

Might be fine for a year… but this is not going to end well if OpenAi goes down.

reasons: The issue is, this is OpenAI
